title: Nginx Service Unavailable
description: Nginx web server is returning 502 Bad Gateway errors to clients. Upstream connections are failing.
logs: 2026-03-10T08:31:55Z [error] 1234#1234: *1 connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 10.0.1.55, server: api.example.com, request: "GET /api/health HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health", host: "api.example.com"

2026-03-10T08:31:56Z [error] 1234#1234: *2 no live upstreams while connecting to upstream, client: 10.0.1.66, server: api.example.com, request: "POST /api/data HTTP/1.1", upstream: "http://upstream_backend/api/data", host: "api.example.com"
2026-03-10T08:31:57Z [warn]  1234#1234: *3 upstream server temporarily disabled while reading response header from upstream
2026-03-10T08:32:00Z [error] 1234#1234: *4 recv() failed (104: Connection reset by peer) while reading response header from upstream
2026-03-10T08:32:10Z [crit]  1234#1234: *5 SSL_do_handshake() failed (SSL: error:00000000:lib(0):func(0):reason(0)) while SSL handshaking to upstream
